text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser is in top form and ready to
take on the Japan Cup. Everyone is expecting
great things from her and excited to see the race!
But on the day of...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get a phone call saying that she collapsed with a
nosebleed and was taken to the hospital.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although her condition isn't serious, the doctor
tells her she can't run today. Matikanetannhauser
acts tough, yet tears of frustration fight their way
out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But as they do, her friends come to cheer her up.
She may have missed a great opportunity to
become a star, but her friends tell her to stay
positive because there's still next time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's said those exact words to others countless
times to inspire them. Reinvigorated,
Matikanetannhauser tells herself, "Next time!"
and aims for the Arima Kinen!
